description: Operator-declared rulebook sections for heading-anchor chunking and RulePassage targeting. Replaces ad hoc page=chunk boundaries for declared phases. Patterns must match the PDF text layer of the verified edition.
verified_note: Heading patterns below are initial drafts for Bare Bones (second printing 2019). Operator must confirm regexes against extracted text before marking status verified.

handoff.sync: Copy with ingest-manifest via scripts/sync-ingest-manifest.ps1. See docs/outbox/ingest-manifest-sync.md.

anchor_matching.notes: Anchors match line-start headings in concatenated document text (page order). End anchor is exclusive — section text is after start through before end.

sections.title: Abilities
sections.notes: Four abilities and modifiers at creation.

sections.title: Tests and Difficulty Ratings
sections.notes: Core test procedure (d20 + mod vs DR), default DR 12, DR reference table on p.28.

sections.title: Violence (combat)
sections.notes: Phase 2 — defer until ability-test spike passes.
